gemini.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash

resetPolicy.note: Official Gemini free-tier RPD resets at midnight Pacific time.

notes: Grounding with Google Search has its own free allowance and may differ from generic text generation.

serpapi.label: SerpApi Google Flights

resetPolicy.note: Cached identical searches are free and do not count against monthly search credits.

notes: Free plan shows 250 searches per month on SerpApi pricing.
Cached identical queries are free per SerpApi docs.

openweathermap.label: OpenWeatherMap

resetPolicy.note: OpenWeatherMap pricing page states the first 1,000 API calls per day are free.

notes: This dashboard currently uses current weather and short forecast endpoints only.
